title: phyllanthus umbricola
intro: Phyllanthus umbricola, also known as the small leafed Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus umbricola include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve digestion, among others. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
